title: Weapons pack rp
description: The pack adds different models of firearms to the bow/crossbow, etc.
body:
# Weapons pack
This resource pack will add models of firearms. To do this, you will need to rename a certain weapon on the anvil.

# Dependencies
This pack requires Optifine or CIT Resewn, either can be downloaded below:
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

# Weapon Names:
bow:
* AK 47
* M416/B114
* mac10
* Mauser
* revolver
* thompson
* BFG 9000
* tec 9

crossbow:
* AWM
* shotgun
* winchester
* RPG-7
* signal rocket
* grenade launcher

netherite/diamond sword:
* Finka NKVD

arrows:
* patron
* shotgun cartridge
* bullet

splash/linerring potion:
* grenade

TNT:
* nuclear bomb
